PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Frutig, via Zoom, for Beverly J. Titus, Administrator.

The court acknowledges the status of this matter and advises counsel that it is waiting for his proposed order. Counsel reports that he can draft and send the proposed order to the court. The court confirms with counsel that he agrees that a one-year extension of the Administration should be adequate. The court instructs counsel to send his proposed order via email to the Probate Director and is provided the email address. The court confirms that the court is inclined to extend the administration to Dec-04-2023 and instructs counsel to include the preceding date in his proposed order.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
